data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of an approval workflow for high-value bookings. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or validations confirming the existence or functionality of such a workflow. The linked use case explicitly states the need for an approval workflow, but there is no evidence demonstrating that this requirement has been implemented or tested, indicating a clear gap in requirement fulfillment.
gaps: No evidence of an approval workflow for high-value bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define approval workflow validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the approval workflow for high-value bookings is implemented and functioning as required.
